raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX I purchased a gaming console from Best Buy using a My Best Buy Visa Card issued by Citibank. In XX/XX/XXXX I returned the item to the Best Buy store and received a confirmed refund of {$530.00} back to the card. I have the return receipt confirming this transaction. 
Despite the confirmed return, Citibank has continued to generate monthly billing statements demanding payment on this account. As of XX/XX/XXXX the statement shows a balance of {$1100.00} with a minimum payment of {$180.00} due on an account that should reflect XXXX following the confirmed return. 
I have contacted both Citibank and Best Buy more than four times each to resolve this. Both companies repeatedly directed me back to the other party with no resolution. On at least one occasion a Citibank representative dropped the call while I was in the middle of explaining the situation. Neither company has taken any action to reconcile the accounts or correct the error. 
I am seeking the following resolution : confirmation in writing that the account balance is XXXX, confirmation that the account is closed, confirmation that no adverse credit reporting has been made or will be made to any credit bureau in connection with this disputed balance, and an immediate halt to all collection calls and billing demands.
